title: B.Sc. Honours in Computer Science
description: A comprehensive study of computer hardware, software, and systems, preparing students for the dynamic tech industry.
eligibility: Intermediate (10+2) with MPC (Maths, Physics, Chemistry) or equivalent.
careerProspects: Software Developer, IT Consultant, Systems Analyst, Data Engineer.

title: B.Sc. Honours in Physics
description: Deep dive into the fundamental laws of nature, from quantum mechanics to astrophysics.
careerProspects: Research Scientist, Lab Technician, Academician, Technical Writer.

title: B.Sc. Honours in Chemistry
description: Exploration of matter and its changes, focusing on organic, inorganic, and physical chemistry.
careerProspects: Chemical Engineer, Pharmacist, Forensic Scientist, Research Associate.

title: B.Sc. Honours in Botany
description: The study of plant life, ecology, and biology, crucial for environmental science and agriculture.
careerProspects: Botanist, Environmental Consultant, Plant Breeder, Ecologist.

title: B.Sc. Honours in Zoology
description: Understanding animal biology, physiology, and evolution.
careerProspects: Zoologist, Wildlife Biologist, Veterinarian, Marine Biologist.

title: B.Com. Honours in Computer Applications
description: Blending traditional commerce and accounting with modern computer software applications.
careerProspects: Accountant, Business Analyst, E-commerce Specialist, Finance Manager.

title: B.A. Honours in Political Science
description: Analytical study of political systems, theory, and international relations.
careerProspects: Policy Analyst, Civil Servant, Public Relations Officer, Journalist.
